description: Form cohorts based on time periods (daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly)

variations.name: Monthly cohorts with default settings
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='signup_date',
    time_period='month'
)

variations.name: Weekly cohorts with custom column name
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='registration_date',
    cohort_column='registration_week',
    time_period='week'
)

variations.name: Daily cohorts with formatting
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='purchase_date',
    time_period='day',
    format_cohorts=True
)

variations.name: Quarterly cohorts with datetime format
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='join_date',
    time_period='quarter',
    format_cohorts=True,
    datetime_format='%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'
)

variations.name: Yearly cohorts without formatting
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts(
    date_column='first_activity_date',
    time_period='year',
    format_cohorts=False
)

description: Form cohorts based on user behavior using conditions or custom functions

variations.name: Subscription plan cohorts with custom mapping
Device type cohorts with conditions
Purchase frequency cohorts with numeric conditions
Age-based demographic cohorts
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts(
    behavior_column='age',
    cohort_column='age_group',
    conditions={
        '18-24': 'age >= 18 and age <= 24',
        '25-34': 'age >= 25 and age <= 34',
        '35-44': 'age >= 35 and age <= 44',
        '45-54': 'age >= 45 and age <= 54',
        '55+': 'age >= 55'
    }
)

variations.name: Engagement level cohorts

description: Form cohorts based on acquisition time and source

variations.name: Monthly acquisition cohorts with source
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_acquisition_cohorts(
    acquisition_date_column='signup_date',
    acquisition_source_column='acquisition_channel',
    time_period='month'
)

variations.name: Weekly cohorts without source combination
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_acquisition_cohorts(
    acquisition_date_column='registration_date',
    acquisition_source_column='marketing_source',
    cohort_column='acquisition_week',
    time_period='week',
    combine_source=False
)

variations.name: Quarterly cohorts with custom formatting
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_acquisition_cohorts(
    acquisition_date_column='first_purchase_date',
    acquisition_source_column='traffic_source',
    time_period='quarter',
    format_cohorts=True,
    datetime_format='%Y-%m-%d'
)

variations.name: Classic monthly retention for 6 months
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts('signup_date', 'cohort', 'month')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_retention(
    cohort_column='cohort',
    date_column='activity_date',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    time_period='month',
    max_periods=6,
    retention_type='classic'
)

variations.name: Rolling weekly retention for 8 weeks
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts('signup_date', 'signup_week', 'week')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_retention(
    cohort_column='signup_week',
    date_column='login_date',
    user_id_column='app_user_id',
    time_period='week',
    max_periods=8,
    retention_type='rolling'
)

variations.name: Daily retention with datetime format
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts('registration_date', 'cohort', 'day')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_retention(
    cohort_column='cohort',
    date_column='session_date',
    user_id_column='device_id',
    time_period='day',
    max_periods=30,
    retention_type='classic',
    datetime_format='%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'
)

variations.name: Unbounded retention for behavioral cohorts
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts('subscription_plan', 'plan_cohort')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_retention(
    cohort_column='plan_cohort',
    date_column='renewal_date',
    user_id_column='subscriber_id',
    time_period='quarter',
    max_periods=4,
    retention_type='unbounded'
)

variations.name: Yearly retention for 3 years
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts('join_date', 'cohort', 'year')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_retention(
    cohort_column='cohort',
    date_column='account_activity_date',
    user_id_column='customer_id',
    time_period='year',
    max_periods=3,
    retention_type='classic'
)

description: Calculate conversion funnel metrics for cohorts

variations.name: Basic conversion funnel with rates
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts('pricing_tier', 'cohort')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_conversion(
    cohort_column='cohort',
    event_column='user_action',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    funnel_steps=['trial_started', 'feature_used', 'paywall_viewed', 'subscription_purchased'],
    include_rates=True
)

variations.name: Conversion funnel with custom step names
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts('user_segment', 'cohort')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_conversion(
    cohort_column='cohort',
    event_column='onboarding_step',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    funnel_steps=['account_created', 'profile_completed', 'tutorial_viewed', 'first_task_completed'],
    step_names=['Account', 'Profile', 'Tutorial', 'First Task'],
    include_rates=True
)

variations.name: Cumulative conversion funnel
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts('customer_type', 'cohort')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_conversion(
    cohort_column='cohort',
    event_column='shopping_action',
    user_id_column='visitor_id',
    funnel_steps=['product_page_view', 'add_to_cart', 'begin_checkout', 'shipping_details', 'payment_details', 'order_confirm'],
    cumulative=True
)

variations.name: Non-cumulative step-to-step conversion
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts('role_type', 'cohort')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_conversion(
    cohort_column='cohort',
    event_column='feature_event',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    funnel_steps=['feature_discovered', 'feature_clicked', 'feature_configured', 'feature_used_multiple_times'],
    step_names=['Discovery', 'First Click', 'Configuration', 'Adoption'],
    include_rates=True,
    cumulative=False
)

variations.name: Simple conversion without rates
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts('signup_date', 'cohort', 'month')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_conversion(
    cohort_column='cohort',
    event_column='event_type',
    user_id_column='email_id',
    funnel_steps=['email_signup', 'site_visit', 'product_view', 'purchase']
)

description: Calculate lifetime value metrics for cohorts

variations.name: Cumulative monthly LTV for 6 months
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts('region', 'cohort')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_lifetime_value(
    cohort_column='cohort',
    date_column='transaction_date',
    user_id_column='customer_id',
    value_column='revenue',
    time_period='month',
    max_periods=6,
    cumulative=True
)

variations.name: Non-cumulative weekly LTV for 52 weeks
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts('subscription_plan', 'cohort')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_lifetime_value(
    cohort_column='cohort',
    date_column='week_date',
    user_id_column='subscriber_id',
    value_column='subscription_revenue',
    time_period='week',
    max_periods=52,
    cumulative=False
)

variations.name: Daily LTV with datetime format
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts('customer_type', 'cohort')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_lifetime_value(
    cohort_column='cohort',
    date_column='order_date',
    user_id_column='customer_id',
    value_column='order_value',
    time_period='day',
    max_periods=90,
    cumulative=False,
    datetime_format='%Y-%m-%d'
)

variations.name: Quarterly LTV for 4 quarters
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts('acquisition_date', 'cohort', 'quarter')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_lifetime_value(
    cohort_column='cohort',
    date_column='purchase_date',
    user_id_column='user_id',
    value_column='purchase_amount',
    time_period='quarter',
    max_periods=4,
    cumulative=True
)

variations.name: Yearly LTV for 3 years
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts('industry', 'cohort')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_lifetime_value(
    cohort_column='cohort',
    date_column='transaction_date',
    user_id_column='account_id',
    value_column='contract_value',
    time_period='year',
    max_periods=3,
    cumulative=False
)

description: Convert cohort analysis results to DataFrame
prerequisites: Any cohort analysis function (calculate_retention, calculate_conversion, calculate_lifetime_value)

variations.name: Convert last analysis to DataFrame
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts('signup_date', 'cohort', 'month')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_retention('cohort', 'activity_date', 'user_id', 'month', 6)
result_df = cohort_pipe.to_df()

variations.name: Convert specific analysis to DataFrame
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts('subscription_plan', 'cohort')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_conversion('cohort', 'event', 'user_id', ['step1', 'step2'])
result_df = cohort_pipe.to_df(analysis_name='behavioral_cohorts_conversion')

variations.name: Convert with metadata
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts('signup_date', 'cohort', 'month')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_lifetime_value('cohort', 'date', 'user_id', 'value', 'month', 12)
result_df = cohort_pipe.to_df(include_metadata=True)

description: Merge cohort analysis results into base dataframe

variations.name: Merge last analysis results
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts('signup_date', 'cohort', 'month')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_retention('cohort', 'activity_date', 'user_id', 'month', 6)
merged_df = cohort_pipe.merge_to_df(original_data)

variations.name: Merge specific analysis with metadata
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts('subscription_plan', 'cohort')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_conversion('cohort', 'event', 'user_id', ['step1', 'step2'])
merged_df = cohort_pipe.merge_to_df(original_data, analysis_name='behavioral_cohorts_conversion', include_metadata=True)

description: Get summary of cohort analysis results

variations.name: Get summary of last analysis
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_time_cohorts('signup_date', 'cohort', 'month')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_retention('cohort', 'activity_date', 'user_id', 'month', 6)
summary = cohort_pipe.get_summary()

variations.name: Get summary of specific analysis
variations.example:
cohort_pipe = CohortPipe.from_dataframe(data)
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | form_behavioral_cohorts('subscription_plan', 'cohort')
cohort_pipe = cohort_pipe | calculate_conversion('cohort', 'event', 'user_id', ['step1', 'step2'])
summary = cohort_pipe.get_summary(analysis_name='behavioral_cohorts_conversion')
